3012260.name: ZukuRace
3012260.description:
ZukuRace is a classic racing game with realistic physics and futuristic cars.
You can take part in racing event somewhere on the Earth in optimistic future.

There are 3 cars, 3 tracks, career mode to unlock them all. PvE, PvP, split screen and multiplayer.

Game Modes:

  • Quick Race: Select a track, a car and drive.

  • Career: Unlock new cars and tracks.

  • Multiplayer: Just run with your friends.

  • Split screen local PvP (Select player 2 in "Quick Race" mode).

The game has a complex car physics including tire, wheel, suspension dynamics, aerodynamics: (front, rear wings and body contributions).

ZukuRace is a gamepad-oriented racing game.

It requires precise trigger presses (e.g. trail braking technique) and analog stick movement. It was developed and tested with XBox gamepad.

You can play with keyboard as well (not the best experience).

Steering wheel is not supported yet.

If any bugs are encountered, please report them on the Discord server. No personal data is collected, so if something goes wrong, a report would be appreciated. Help me to make an awesome game for you.

The game is constantly evolving — new features will be added as soon as possible.

Hopefully, you find this game interesting. Welcome here!
3012260.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
